title: [MTR4] American Bus Pack
description: Adds Busses from The United States and Canada to MTR4
body:
This pack adds Busses and Trolleybusses from Various Cities in the United States and Canada

Gillig:
---
Low Floor Avalable in HART, RTD, MMT, MATA, CT, ATA, And HRT Liveries

Low Floor BRT+ Avalable in RTA Dayton and VTA Liveries

Phantom Avalable in Sound Transit and VTA Liveries

New Flyer:
---
Xcelsior:

XD40 Avalable in WMATA Metrobus, DART, MBTA, and MTA Liveries

XT40 Avalable in MUNI Livery

XD60 in LYNX, Miami-Dade Transit, and Sound Transit Liveries

XT60 in MUNI Livery

Nova Bus:
---
LFS Avalable in CTA and SEPTA Liveries

BYD:
---
K10MR Avalable in RTD Livery

Blue Bird:
---
Vision Avalable in Generic Livery

Requirements:
---
MTR4 Version requires MTR 4.0.4 or Later

MTR3 Version not Avalable

This pack is not affiliated with any company shown in this pack

Requires MTR 4.0.4 or Later

[mBus Redux](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mbusredux) is Recomended for Trolleybus Wires. Please Support NBT1248!

Sounds by Szandor the 13th
